title: UML-MCP Session Configuration
description: Configuration for UML diagram generation when connecting via Smithery. Values are passed as query parameters (HTTP) or CLI args (stdio).

output_dir.title: Output Directory
output_dir.description: Directory to save generated diagram files (e.g. ./output)

kroki_server.title: Kroki Server URL
kroki_server.description: Kroki server URL for diagram rendering (default: https://kroki.io)

plantuml_server.title: PlantUML Server URL
plantuml_server.description: Optional PlantUML server URL (leave empty to use Kroki)

theme.title: Default theme
theme.description: Default PlantUML theme for diagram appearance (e.g. cerulean, sketchy-outline). Optional; only applies to PlantUML diagram types.
